title: aspidium filix-mas var. goldieanum
intro: Aspidium filix-mas var. goldieanum, also known as Goldie's Lady Fern, is a variety of the common lady fern plant, characterized by its delicate fronds and unique growth habits. The Goldie's Lady Fern has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that aid in wound healing and the reduction of pain. This plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the Goldie's Lady Fern is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be supervised by a medical professional due to potential side effects.
